expectations.text: The workflow launches multiple code-explorer subagents with distinct lenses before writing the PRD.

expectations.text: The workflow performs targeted research from official sources before recording implementation decisions.

expectations.text: The workflow asks one user question at a time and includes a recommended answer for each question.

expectations.text: The final PRD follows the required template and includes a GitHub issue title/body plus the intended gh issue create command for offline filing.
